title: Roles
description: A plugin that adds 4 new roles to the game, each with its unique ability and passive effect
body:
**Adds 4 powerful roles in the game, each with their own passive and ability.** ## Roles **The Miner: Master of the Depths** * Passive: Grants permanent Haste I, allowing for faster mining and digging at all times. * Ability: A powerful burst of Haste V for 3 seconds, perfect for instantly clearing veins of ore or stone. * Cooldown: 40 seconds. **The Warrior: The Unstoppable Juggernaut** * Passive: Grants permanent Resistance I, reducing all incoming damage. * Ability: Unleashes a battle cry, granting Strength I for 5 seconds to vanquish foes with increased melee damage. * Cooldown: 40 seconds. **The Ninja: The Elusive Shadow** * Passive: Grants permanent Speed I, increasing your movement and sprint speed. * Ability: A burst of agility that provides Speed II for 10 seconds, ideal for swift escapes or closing the distance on a target. * Cooldown: 40 seconds. **The Nether-Kin: The Fire Incarnate** * Passive: Grants permanent Fire Resistance, making you immune to fire, lava, and magma blocks. * Ability: Launches a destructive fireball in the direction you are looking, identical to a Ghast's projectile. * Cooldown: 15 seconds. ## Usage To choose a role, use the ```/roles``` command (doesn't require operator).
Choosing roles has no cooldown, but a player cannot have more than one active role at a time .
The default ability keybind is F.
